[Description](#tab-description-1873)

**Gyeon Smoothie EVO | Microfiber Wash Mitt 1250 GSM**

**Q M Smoothie EVO is an improved version of our legendary synthetic wash mitt. It now features a selection of 3 different types of fibers and has a GSM of 1250. An edgeless finish, a practical welt, and functional sewing inside make it an ergonomic tool suitable for every vehicle. Q M Smoothie EVO glides over the surface collecting dirt particles in the safest possible way. The washing process feels more lubricated and smooth than ever. With the added twist loop fibers, the cleaning power has increased compared to the previous version.**

INNOVATIVE FIBERS
This wash mitt for cars offers main features - safety, softness, and comfort - add extended durability due to the innovative type of fibers. Q M Smoothie EVO is the perfect high-quality wash mitt for both professionals and detailing enthusiasts alike.

A SMOOTH SAFE WASH
Q M Smoothie EVO glides over the surface collecting dirt particles in the safest possible way. The washing process feels more lubricated and smooth. The mitt is equipped with an ergonomic welt protecting it from slipping or falling. It is made of genuine Korean material and custom sewn by Gyeon.
